finding.title: Best Manager
finding.exec_summary: Cara Losch (East regional office) has the highest win rate at 0.6443. She closed 745 deals, won 480 deals, generated $1,130,049 in won revenue, and closed deals on average in 49.04 days. These figures satisfy the required KPI fields: win_rate, closed_deals, won_deals, won_revenue, avg_cycle_days_closed.
risks: Potential over‑reliance on a single manager's performance
Data accuracy concerns in win/closed metrics
recommendations: Implement regular performance benchmarking across regions
Validate KPI data sources for consistency

finding.title: Rocco Neubert
finding.exec_summary: Rocco Neubert has the lowest win_rate at 0.6208, with 1113 closed_deals, 691 won_deals, $1,960,545 won_revenue, and an average_cycle_days_closed of 45.84 days.
risks: low win rate reduces revenue potential
high average cycle days affect cash flow
